stemHtml: Which of the following statement correctly describes wing fences?

options.a: Flat plates fixed to the upper surfaces parallel to the wing chord.
options.b: Flat plates fixed to the upper surfaces perpendicular to the wing chord.
options.c: Small vertical fin attached to the rear and bottom of a fuselage.
options.d: Flat plates fixed to the lower surface of a wing at a 45 degree angle to the wing chord.
